overall.description: A first-person exploration of a futuristic luxury office interior from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves slowly from a bar area featuring holographic wine glasses, past a conference table with a large holographic fish projection, toward a back wall with modern art and glass exit doors. The space features dark walls, polished red flooring, cyan neon accent lighting, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a futuristic cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bar area with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: slowly walking along the bar counter examining the holographic wine glasses and bar surface

entered.detail: dark polished bar surface with metallic cups and holographic displays
glowing cyan holographic wine glasses arranged in a row on the bar
floor-to-ceiling windows showing futuristic city buildings with warm afternoon light
cyan neon light strips running along the ceiling
digital tablet or book lying on the bar surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic luxury bar area with glowing cyan holographic wine glasses arranged on a dark polished counter. The camera moves slowly along the bar, revealing metallic cups and a datapad on the surface, with large windows to the right showing a sunlit cityscape outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from bar to conference area

events.description: moving past the bar counter into the main conference room area with large table

agents.ego_description: walking past the bar toward the large conference table near the windows

entered.detail: large dark rectangular conference table with office chairs arranged around it
holographic projection of an orange koi fish swimming inside a blue spherical bubble
modern ergonomic office chairs with metallic frames

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the bar area into a spacious conference room, revealing a large meeting table and a striking holographic fish tank projection near the windows. The bar and its holographic glasses fall behind as the conference table and office chairs come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: conference table with holographic display and scattered documents

events.description: slowing to examine the conference table surface and holographic fish up close

agents.ego_description: circling the conference table to examine the documents, desk bell, and holographic fish projection from different angles

entered.detail: scattered papers and documents with handwritten text spread across the table
metallic service bell with golden base sitting on the conference table

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the conference table, moving closer to examine scattered documents, a metallic desk bell, and the holographic fish projection. The perspective shifts to show different sides of the table and the city view through the windows as the camera moves around the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with wall art and glass exit doors

events.description: moving into darker area away from windows, lighting becomes more artificial and moody

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back wall featuring modern art, a planter box, and glass double doors

entered.detail: abstract golden-brown textured painting mounted on the dark wall
rectangular marble planter with green plants and golden vertical slat partition
glass double doors with metallic frames leading to an adjacent room or corridor
modern cushioned bench below the wall art

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the conference area into a darker corridor featuring a large abstract painting, a modern bench, and a planter with greenery. The lighting shifts to artificial as the windows fall out of view, and the camera approaches glass exit doors at the end of the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a high-end futuristic office that transitions from a bright, holographic lounge into a dim, art-filled corridor. It begins by gliding along a dark polished bar counter adorned with glowing cyan holographic wine glasses and datapads, with sunlit cityscapes visible through expansive windows. As the camera leaves the bar area, the space opens into a conference room where the focus shifts toward a large meeting table and a striking holographic fish tank projection. The perspective then circles the table to examine scattered documents and a metallic bell before turning away from the natural light of the windows. Finally, the scene shifts into a darker interior corridor featuring an abstract painting and a modern bench, moving past a greenery planter toward glass exit doors.
